title: container cgroup path
body:
Before querying for a container's cgroup path, make sure that the
container is synced.  Also make sure to error out if the container
isn't running.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@mheon PTAL

Trying to wrap my head around how this PR could cause:
```
[+3742s] Error: error configuring CNI network plugin: could not create new watcher too many open files
```
Cannot reproduce locally.
